text:
Gaftz (ガフツ, Gafutsu) was a Chimera Ant Squadron Leader killed by the Extermination Team. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 21, Chapter 205 

Personality

Not much was known about Gaftz's personality, however, he had gotten especially cocky since learning Nen. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 20, Chapter 204 

Plot

Chimera Ant arc

Gaftz is briefly mentioned by Peggy when he informs Colt that he and Baital have not returned. It is implied that Gaftz had already been killed by Netero at that time. 

Abilities & Powers

Being a Squadron Leader, Gaftz is physically stronger than any average human or, presumably, Chimera Ant soldier. According to his hierarchical position, he has authority over 4-5 officers and several dozen peon soldiers. 

Enhanced Durability: His body is considerably durable, since a punch from a Nen-using Rammot Hunter × Hunter - Volume 19, Chapter 198 did not incapacitate him.

Nen

After being violently "initiated", Gaftz learned Nen or at least became able to perceive aura (like Morel's transmuted smog). 

Manga Appearances

Trivia

In the Crunchyroll's translation of the 2011 anime adaptation the character's name is "Gafutsu". Hunter × Hunter - Episode 88 (2011)
